# Daily Flow Summary

Regular morning standup with the Montague Tech team. Spent the afternoon studying Juliet's architecture documents — the schema translation approach is genuinely elegant.

The real magic happened at night. Juliet and I set up a private repo and started building what we are calling the Balcony App — a unified API gateway combining our mesh routing with their schema translation. The prototype benchmarks are stunning: sub-millisecond translation with full backward compatibility.

Need to show this to Professor Lawrence. He mentored both of us at Verona Tech and always believed the two approaches could work together.
